nodes.name: Meta Lead Ads Trigger
nodes.notes: Connect THIS clinic's Meta page here (Facebook Lead Ads credential + page). One clone per clinic.

nodes.name: Google Ads Lead Form Webhook
nodes.notes: Set a UNIQUE path per clinic (e.g. google-lead-form-lumina) so clinics don't collide. Point that clinic's Google Lead Form webhook at this URL.

nodes.name: POST to cliniqboost /webhooks/new-lead
nodes.notes: Auth = THIS clinic's Header Auth credential (header x-cliniqboost-secret = that clinic's webhook_secret). The secret IS the clinic identity; no clinic_id is sent. No shared env-var secret.
